title: Anisolobus psidiifolius
taxonomy: Anisolobus psidiifolius is a species of flowering plant in the family Santalaceae. It belongs to the genus Anisolobus, which is a group of parasitic plants. This plant is native to Australia and is a type of mistletoe that grows on the branches of other plants. Anisolobus psidiifolius is a hemiparasitic plant, meaning it gets some of its nutrients from the host plant while also photosynthesizing. The classification of Anisolobus psidiifolius is further supported by its unique characteristics and morphology.
